seo.title: Tour Des Moines Wellness Center - Addiction Rehab in Iowa | Des Moines Wellness Center | Alcohol & Drug Rehab Iowa
seo.description: Explore Des Moines Wellness Center in Des Moines, Iowa. Tour our detox, residential treatment, and recovery spaces designed to support lasting healing.

hero.eyebrow: A Clinical Space Designed For Healing
hero.headline: Tour Our Luxury Facility
hero.subhead: Recovery starts with a safe, structured environment. Our Des Moines facility is engineered to provide the physical comfort and medical security necessary for your transition from crisis to health. Take a virtual look at the high-level setting where your recovery journey begins.

image.alt: Patients celebrating recovery milestones and clinical progress at our Des Moines facility.

sections.heading: THE DES MOINES EXPERIENCE
sections.subheading: Getting Them The Support They Need
body: Our Des Moines facility redefines the clinical experience, blending high-level medical oversight with the refined comfort of a premium recovery retreat.

sections.heading: We Work With Your Insurance
sections.subheading: Making Drug Rehab Affordable in Iowa
body: Rehab shouldn’t break the bank. We work directly with major private providers like Wellmark Blue Cross Blue Shield, NYSHIP, Aetna, and more to keep your out-of-pocket costs as low as possible. We’ll handle the phone calls to the insurance company for you. Call us now or fill out the form below and a member of our team will reach out shortly.

sections.heading: Stop Managing the Crisis. Start Mapping the Recovery.
sections.subheading: The Best Version of Your Life is Within Reach
body: Recovery isn’t just about leaving addiction behind, it’s about moving toward the life you deserve. At Des Moines Wellness Center, we provide the clinical expertise and local community support to help you rediscover your purpose. Let’s build your path forward together, starting right now.

images.alt: Patients celebrating recovery milestones and clinical progress at our Des Moines facility.
